overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort MSCI Emerging Markets (EEV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund provides 2x inverse leveraged exposure to an index representing 85% of the market cap in emerging market countries. EEV was launched on Nov 1, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
